**Exit point:** {{LAST_SCHENGEN_COUNTRY}} via {{DEPARTURE_AIRPORT}}

> in the deny-listed `appointments/` folder, never here.

## Notes for the consulate

- **Main-destination rule:** {{COUNTRY_1}} has {{X}} nights vs {{COUNTRY_2}}
  with {{Y}} nights → apply via {{COUNTRY_1}} consulate.
- **First-entry rule:** {{COUNTRY_1}} is also the first Schengen entry.
- All bookings are **refundable** until visa is approved.
